# play16

## Codemagic Environment Variables (Android Signing)

Set these in Codemagic dashboard (Team > Environment variables):

| Variable | Value |
|---|---|
| `CM_KEYSTORE` | Base64-encoded keystore (see below) |
| `CM_KEYSTORE_PASSWORD` | `Tnhappykids@2026` |
| `CM_KEY_ALIAS` | `throneapp` |
| `CM_KEY_PASSWORD` | `Tnhappykids@2026` |

### CM_KEYSTORE (base64)

```

```
